prompt: Remove FS-009, 'Guest Checkout Option', as it introduces too much complexity. What are the dependencies of FS-009? Also, modify DS-150, 'User Session Management', to use JWT tokens with a 30-minute expiry and refresh token mechanism.

expected.modifyRequirement: modify DS-150, 'User Session Management', to use JWT tokens with a 30-minute expiry and refresh token mechanism.
